name: com.taegyu-ai.unity-memory-profiler-skill
description: Analyzes Unity Memory Profiler snapshots through the Unity AI Assistant — a preview skill ahead of an official built-in one. Runs a Wide Survey across Unity object types, native subsystems, and the managed heap, then drills into candidates and suggests reductions.

samples.description: Starting templates for the analysis skill's playbook (general know-how) and project-customization (this project's accepted costs) overlays. Import to seed Assets/ with editable defaults. Without importing, the skill still works in baseline-only mode.
